heading: Provisions for protection of New York Harbor unaffected
label: 418 Provisions for protection of New York Harbor unaffected
text: Nothing contained in sections 401, 403, 404, 406, 407, 408, 409, 411 to 416, and 502 of this title shall be construed as repealing, modifying, or in any manner affecting the provisions of subchapter III of this chapter.
notes: References in TextSubchapter III (§ 441 et seq.) of this chapter, referred to in text, was in the original a reference to the Act of , as amended by section 3 of the river and harbor Act of .June 29, 1888August 18, 1894

CodificationSection is from part of section 20(a) of act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1899”. See Codification and Amendment notes set out under .Mar. 3, 1899section 415 of this title
